creator: danny@dannywarren.com
text:
(In reply to Cy Schubert from comment #8)
Thanks Cy, I did see D1289.  However, that entry doesn't provide any background on how those config values were derived, and the PC-BSD repo they were pulled from doesn't either.

For example, the "logfile flush" line appears to be a null op in this context.  What is the purpose of that setting?
